title: rubus andegavensis
intro: Rubus andegavensis, also known as Andegavensis raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the western coast of France. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus andegavensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
